stories: Good morning Sean, it's Friday, the eighth of May, 2026
Fun fact: on this day in 1945, Germany signed the unconditional surrender ending World War II in Europe — still observed as Liberation Day there today, which is relevant to this morning's news
Looking at your Friday — morning run from seven until half-eight, Triage Time eight to eight-thirty
Lunch blocked from noon, then L4 Open Time from one to twenty past three, and Weekly Close-out at half three to wrap the week
In Singapore, PM Lawrence Wong is in Cebu for the final day of the 48th ASEAN Summit, with regional leaders focused on the Iran crisis ripple effects and South China Sea tensions
Back home, a new survey shows 88 percent of Singaporeans expect higher inflation this year, despite actual CPI holding at just 1
COE premiums also edged up in May's first bidding round
The dominant story globally is still the US-Israel war on Iran
Good evening Sean, it's Thursday evening, the seventh of May, 2026
Evolution found the formula once, and kept using it
Looking ahead to Friday â you've got your Morning Run at seven, Triage Time at eight, then your PMO Connect on Teams at quarter to ten
The L4 EAS PPS follows from ten until eleven
Lunch is blocked from noon, then at one o'clock it's your bi-monthly catch-up with Ajit on Teams
L4 Open Time runs through the mid-afternoon, and the Weekly Close-out lands at three-thirty
Good day to tie off loose ends before the weekend
Amazon is cutting roles here and phasing out local fulfilment â including Amazon Fresh â retreating from a market they've struggled to crack against entrenched local players
Good morning Sean, it's Thursday, the seventh of May, 2026
Here's your fun fact: in all of American history, not a single U
President has ever died in the month of May
Every other month has claimed at least one â but May has a perfect record

Noon is the L4 EAS Fortnightly, lunch from half-twelve, then a catch-up with Jack at one-thirty on Webex
T400 Performance and Reward session at two, GBSLT Quarterly pre-work blocked from three to four, coffee with Gyanam at four on Level 18
